config.name: cisco_isa3000_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: cisco_isa3000_logs-latest
-- OCSF Class: Security Control (2001) & Network Activity (4001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:22:36.733926

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local patterns = {
    ip = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$",
    port = "^%d+$"
}

-- Lookup tables for mappings
local severity_map = {
    CRITICAL = 5,
    HIGH = 4, 
    WARNING = 3,
    NOTICE = 2,
    INFO = 1
}

local action_map = {
    DENY = 2,
    DROP = 2,
    ALLOW = 1,
    ALERT = 99
}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize output with efficient memory usage
    local output = {
        -- Common fields
        time = record.timestamp,
        device = {},
        metadata = {},
        
        -- Default classification
        class_uid = 2001,
        class_name = "Security Control",
        category_uid = 2,
        category_name = "Findings"
    }

    -- Efficient device info population
    if record.hostname then
        output.device.hostname = record.hostname
    end
    if record.device_ip then
        output.device.ip = record.device_ip
    end

    -- Event type specific processing
    if record.event_type == "FIREWALL" then
        -- Firewall event processing
        output.type_uid = 200101
        output.activity_id = 1
        output.activity_name = "Security Alert"
        
        -- Endpoint information
        output.src_endpoint = {
            ip = record.source_ip,
            port = tonumber(record.source_port),
            zone_uid = record.zone_from
        }
        
        output.dst_endpoint = {
            ip = record.destination_ip,
            port = tonumber(record.destination_port),
            zone_uid = record.zone_to
        }

        -- Connection info
        if record.protocol then
            output.connection_info = {
                protocol_name = record.protocol
            }
        end

        -- Map severity and action
        output.severity_id = severity_map[record.severity] or 1
        output.status_id = action_map[record.action] or 1
        output.disposition = record.action

        -- Generate observables
        if record.source_ip and record.destination_ip then
            output.observables = {
                {
                    name = "src_ip",
                    type = "IP Address",
                    value = record.source_ip
                },
                {
                    name = "dst_ip", 
                    type = "IP Address",
                    value = record.destination_ip
                }
            }
        end

    elseif record.event_type == "MODBUS" then
        -- Modbus event processing
        output.class_uid = 4001
        output.class_name = "Network Activity"
        output.category_uid = 4
        output.category_name = "Network Activity"
        output.type_uid = 400199
        output.activity_id = 99
        output.activity_name = record.action
        
        -- Modbus specific fields
        output.metadata.product = {
            feature = {
                uid = record.modbus_function_code
            }
        }
        output.type_name = record.modbus_function_name
        output.device.uid = record.modbus_unit_id
        output.metadata.correlation_uid = record.register_address
    end

    -- Validation of required fields
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

transforms.name: cisco_isa3000_logs-latest_transform
